shownotes: Elbow contained an extended feedback ending. KGLW.net Staff Notes: The setlist is likely incomplete. Muckraker, I Gotta Rock 'n' Roll and Elbow have been confirmed by audio/video recording, Danger $$$ was confirmed by an attendee report, Cut Throat Boogie was confirmed by a photo of Ambrose on lead vocals and Black Tooth, Bloody Ripper and an unidentified song named “Fuzz Battle” were confirmed by a review. If anyone has any further information on what else was played at this show or, ideally, a complete or conclusive recording please contact KGLW.net staff at setlists@kglw.net.
